notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Nick Yorke to 2nd. Bryan Reynolds advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Ian Happ.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly pops out to first baseman Spencer Horwitz in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki flies out to center fielder Oneil Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Caleb Thielbar. Nick Gonzales scores. Oneil Cruz to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki pops out to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Marcell Ozuna scores. Nick Yorke out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Edward Cabrera challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Oneil Cruz steals (5) 2nd base. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Miguel Amaya.

notableEvents.label: Marcell Ozuna GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcell Ozuna grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 2nd. Marcell Ozuna out at 1st.
